question: How many countries has more than 2 car makers ?
gold_sql: select count(*) from countries as t1 join car_makers as t2 on t1.countryid  =  t2.country group by t1.countryid having count(*)  >  2
predicted_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT nation FROM car_makers GROUP BY nation HAVING COUNT(*) > 2)
raw_response: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT nation FROM car_makers GROUP BY nation HAVING COUNT(*) > 2)
